description: Comprehensive Istio service mesh monitoring dashboard with traffic, performance, error, resource, control plane, data plane, and security metrics.
title: Istio Monitoring Dashboard

widgets.description: Total number of Istio HTTP requests

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Total Requests

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name
namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.description: Total pod restarts for Istio containers

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND container IN ('istio-proxy', 'discovery')

widgets.title: Pod Restarts (Istio)

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.description: Percentage of 5xx errors over total requests

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name AND response_code LIKE '5%'
namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: Error Rate (%)

widgets.description: Request rate grouped by destination service

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Request Distribution by Service

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name
namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.description: Total request throughput across all services

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Throughput

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name AND response_code LIKE '4%'
namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name AND response_code LIKE '5%'

widgets.description: Rate of gRPC errors by status code

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name AND grpc_response_status != '0' AND request_protocol = 'grpc'

widgets.title: gRPC Error Rate

widgets.description: CPU usage for Istio proxy and control plane containers

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND container IN ('istio-proxy', 'discovery')

widgets.title: CPU Usage (Istio Containers)

widgets.description: Memory working set for Istio proxy and control plane containers

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND container IN ('istio-proxy', 'discovery')

widgets.title: Memory Usage (Istio Containers)

widgets.description: Rate of xDS configuration pushes by type

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Pilot xDS Pushes

widgets.description: Time for proxy configuration to converge

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment

widgets.title: Pilot Proxy Convergence Time

widgets.description: Rate of TCP connections opened and closed

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name
namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: TCP Connections

widgets.description: Rate of TCP bytes sent and received

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name
namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND service.name = $service.name

widgets.title: TCP Traffic (Sent/Received)

widgets.description: Request rate by connection security policy

filter.expression: namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND connection_security_policy = 'mutual_tls'
namespace = $namespace AND cluster = $cluster AND deployment_environment = $deployment_environment AND connection_security_policy != 'mutual_tls'

widgets.title: mTLS vs Plaintext Traffic
